name: Metronidazole
description: Nitroimidazole aporo aisan pẹlu anaerobic ti o dara julọ ati agbegbe protozoal. Pataki fun wiwọ inu / ibalokanjẹ ifun lati bo ododo ikun anaerobic. Nigbagbogbo a lo ni apapo pẹlu ciprofloxacin.
indications: C. awọn akoran ti o nira
dose: 500 mg IV q6-8h. PO: 500 mg q8h (ti o ba farada ẹnu).
contraindications: Ni oṣu mẹta akọkọ ti oyun (ojulumo)
metronidazole ti a mọ tabi aleji nitroimidazole
warnings: Idahun bii Disulfiram pẹlu oti -- maṣe jẹ ọti lakoko itọju ati 48h lẹhin.
Le fa neuropathy agbeegbe pẹlu lilo gigun.
Yago fun ni akọkọ trimester ti o ba ti ṣee ṣe.

pediatric.dose: 7.5 mg / kg IV / PO q6h (max 500 mg / iwọn lilo).
pediatric.note: Ailewu ninu awọn ọmọ agbalagba. Yẹra fun awọn ọmọ tuntun.

obstetric.note: Yago fun ni akọkọ trimester ti o ba ti ṣee ṣe. Lo akoko oṣu keji/kẹta nigbati o ba jẹ dandan fun iṣoogun --anfani nigbagbogbo ju eewu fun awọn akoran anaerobic to ṣe pataki.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Abdominal Trauma
